name: Burton Town & Uxbridge

links.title: Burton Town and Uxbridge Neighbourhood Newsletter

description:
Burton’s traffic free town centre has a wide range of shops and leisure facilities and attracts a vibrant crowd of shoppers and revellers.

Uxbridge lies close to the town centre and is a busy and vibrant area of mainly traditional residential properties and small businesses. It has good transport links, excellent schools, local facilities and a diverse choice of places of worship.
